message:
fix: doc_id u64→i64 for SQLite compat, fast-embedder fallback, glob probe rewrite

Search-core changes:
- Change doc_id type from u64 to i64 across fs_bridge, two_tier, and
  benchmarks for SQLite signed integer compatibility
- Fix fast-embedder fallback: when fast embedder fails, always fall back
  to quality refinement if a quality embedder is available regardless of
  quality_only config. Add FailingEmbedder test for this path.
- Fix test zero-vector bug: first embedding entry was 0.1*0=0.0 (zero
  vector), now starts at 0.1*(i+1) for meaningful similarity scores
- Update filter_compiler tests with new agent field and default struct

Server changes:
- Rewrite check_glob_activity_fallback_with_limit to use CompiledPattern +
  walkdir instead of the glob crate — only counts actual files toward scan
  limit (directories no longer consume budget), matches relative paths
- Fix check_git_listed_activity to return Unsupported instead of Inactive
  when stdout capture fails or git exits non-zero
- Add tests: glob_probe_limit_counts_only_files,
  glob_probe_deduplicates_overlapping_directory_matches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
